findings.summary: rd01 (172.16.6.11) was the launch host for the dc01 NTDS.dit theft: spsql network logons (Type 3) to dc01 originated from 172.16.6.11 during the 2018-09-05 12:05-12:27 ntdsutil IFM dump window, with WinRM (wsmprovhost) and WMI (WmiPrvSE) remote-exec parents on dc01 and an ESTABLISHED 172.16.4.4<->172.16.6.11 session in dc01 memory at capture. rd01's own 4648 explicit-credential auth to base-dc corroborates the source side.

evidence.locator: line 2542776; EventID 4624 LogonType 3 TargetUserName spsql IpAddress 172.16.6.11 2018-09-05 12:xx
evidence.description: spsql network logon (Type 3) to dc01 from 172.16.6.11 during NTDS dump window

EV_RTSC=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RTSC" "TerminalServerClient MRU" "spsql NTUSER: outbound RDP hints 172.16.4.5 (as spsql), 172.16.6.14 & 172.16.7.15 (as shieldbase\\nfury) 2018-08-31..09-05")

# NTDS / credential theft chain

EV_NTDS_BKP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132835; .\\Windows\\System\\Backup\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:27:20-35" "ntdsutil IFM dump #2 to C:\\Windows\\System\\Backup (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDSUTIL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)" "spsql executed ntdsutil.exe repeatedly 2018-09-05 12:14-12:27 via WMI and WinRM")
EV_VSS=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543030; EventID 4688 vssadmin.exe parent wsmprovhost.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:05:18" "spsql ran vssadmin.exe via remote PowerShell 2018-09-05 12:05:18")
EV_WSMAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line ~2543877 area; 4688 ntdsutil parent=wsmprovhost.exe/WmiPrvSE.exe Subject spsql" "ntdsutil parent process = wsmprovhost.exe (WinRM) and WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI) = remote execution")
EV_SPSQL_LOGON=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2542776; EventID 4624 LogonType 3 TargetUserName spsql IpAddress 172.16.6.11 2018-09-05 12:xx" "spsql network logon (Type 3) to dc01 from 172.16.6.11 during NTDS dump window")
echo "NTDS: $EV_NTDS_TEMP $EV_NTDS_BKP $EV_NTDSUTIL $EV_VSS $EV_WSMAN $EV_SPSQL_LOGON"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"

INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")
EV_MEMINFO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$INFO" "SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z; KeNumberProcessors=0 (RED/degraded)" "Memory dump degraded (virtual translation dead); physical-layer plugins only; SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z")
EV_FRESP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839610; EventID 7045 ServiceName 'F-Response Subject' 2018-09-06 22:11:15" "F-Response Subject service installed 2018-09-06 22:11:15 (IR acquisition tool)")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")
EV_MNEMO_MFT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132351; .\\Windows\\Mnemosyne.sys 26248 bytes Created 2018-09-07 20:30:59" "Mnemosyne.sys created in C:\\Windows 2018-09-07 20:30:59 (matches 7045 #3)")

source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

EV_4769RC4=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "124x EventID 4769 TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) ServiceName spfarm/spcontent/spsql 2018-08-02..09-07 (~2-5/day)" "124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs spfarm/spcontent/spsql; steady, not bursty")

EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")

findings.summary: Upstream pivot host 172.16.6.14 (BASE-RD-04) was the execution source INTO rd01 (PsExec Type-3 + RDP Type-10 by spsql from 2018-08-27), and also appears as a destination of dc01's spsql remote-exec sessions and an rd01 tool-push target. 172.16.6.14 was not acquired as evidence — it is an un-analyzed node in the chain.

findings.summary: Objective of the intrusion was R&D data collection: on rd01 spsql searched for and opened 'Project Mayhem' / carbonadium / adamantium documents and staged then deleted a 182 MB C:\Windows\Logs\SysBackup archive, while on dc01 the full domain credential database (ntds.dit + SYSTEM/SECURITY, krbtgt included) was dumped twice via ntdsutil IFM. rd01 memory shows sustained connections to internal endpoint 172.16.4.10:8080. Off-network egress is inferred, not directly proven on either host.

produced_by.command:
cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh

ASSET=dc01; SD=mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive
OUT="export/$ASSET/$SD/mft"

run_artifact "$ASSET" "$SD" mft bash -c '
set -e
EZ="dotnet /opt/zimmermantools/MFTECmd.dll"
SRC="./sources/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive"
OUT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft"
# 1. MFT to CSV
$EZ -f "$SRC/\$MFT" --csv "$OUT/" --csvf "dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"
# 3. bodyfile
$EZ -f "$SRC/\$MFT" --body "$OUT/" --bodyf "dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.body" --bdl c
# 4. mactime
mactime -b "$OUT/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.body" -d -y -z UTC | tee "$OUT/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mactime.csv" > /dev/null
'
echo "=== exit done ==="
ls -la "$OUT" 2>/dev/null
tail -3 ./audit/dc01/parse_state.txt

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
echo "=== phase marker (must be 'parse', untouched) ==="
cat ./audit/.dfir_phase
echo ""
echo "=== spot-check 444 locks on OK artifacts ==="
for f in \
  export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv \
  export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv \
  export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/registry/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-registry-recmd.csv \
  export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-psscan-volatility3.csv \
  export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/webcache/Administrator/WebCacheV01.export/Container_1.0 ; do
  [ -e "$f" ] && stat -c '%a  %n' "$f" 2>/dev/null
done
echo ""
echo "=== any writable (non-444) files left in OK artifact dirs? (should be none) ==="
find export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/{mft,usnjrnl,evtx,amcache,lnk,jumplists,registry,scheduledtasks,shimcache,shellbags,webcache} export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img -type f ! -perm 444 2>/dev/null | head
echo "(end)"
echo ""
echo "=== decisions.log + artifact_failures.log (dc01 relevant tail) ==="
tail -12 ./audit/decisions.log
echo "--- failures ---"
grep -iE 'dc01|prefetch|recyclebin|browser|webcache|PARTIAL|\.job|EVTX|memory' ./audit/artifact_failures.log | tail -20

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
MFT=export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv
USN=export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/usnjrnl/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-usnjrnl-mftecmd.csv
echo "=== MFT header ==="
head -1 "$MFT"
echo "=== NTDS.dit / ntds in MFT ==="
grep -i "ntds" "$MFT" | grep -iv "ntdsai\|ntdsa.dll" | head
echo ""
echo "=== Mnemosyne / F-Response in MFT ==="
grep -i -E "mnemosyne|f-response|fresponse" "$MFT" | head
echo ""
echo "=== USN header ==="
head -1 "$USN"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
MFT=export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv
echo "=== ntds.dit file entry ==="
awk -F, 'tolower($7)=="ntds.dit"{print $6"\\"$7" size="$9" Created0x10="$20" Mod="$22}' "$MFT" | head
echo "=== files under .\\Windows\\NTDS (any non-standard) ==="
awk -F, '$6 ~ /\\Windows\\NTDS/{print $6"\\"$7" | "$9}' "$MFT" | sort -u | head -40
echo ""
echo "=== ntdsutil IFM snapshot dirs / any 'IFM' or 'snapshot' ==="
grep -i -E "\\\\IFM|ntdsutil.*snap" "$MFT" | head
grep -i ",Active Directory," "$MFT" | head

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
MFT=export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv
echo "=== contents of .\\temp\\Active Directory and registry subfolder (IFM creates 'registry' with SYSTEM+SECURITY) ==="
awk -F, '$6 ~ /temp\\Active Directory/ || $6 ~ /System\\Backup/{print $6"\\"$7" | size="$9" | Created="$20}' "$MFT" | sort -u | head -40
echo ""
echo "=== any 'registry' folder with SYSTEM/SECURITY near those paths ==="
awk -F, '($7=="SYSTEM" || $7=="SECURITY") && ($6 ~ /temp/ || $6 ~ /Backup/ || $6 ~ /registry/i){print $6"\\"$7" Created="$20}' "$MFT" | head

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
PS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-psscan-volatility3.csv"
INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"
SHIM="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shimcache/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-shimcache-appcompatcacheparser.csv"
SB="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shellbags/rsydow-a"

# System identity
EV_HOST=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\ComputerName\\ComputerName" "ComputerName=BASE-DC; SYSTEM hive")
EV_OS=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion ProductName/CurrentBuild" "Windows Server 2016 Standard, build 14393")
EV_INSTALL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion InstallDate" "OS InstallDate 2018-04-20 16:52:33 UTC")
EV_TZ=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\TimeZoneInformation Bias=300" "Timezone bias 300 (UTC-5, US Eastern)")
EV_SHUT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\Windows ShutdownTime" "Last shutdown 2018-09-07 20:25:33 UTC")

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

EV_4769RC4=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "124x EventID 4769 TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) ServiceName spfarm/spcontent/spsql 2018-08-02..09-07 (~2-5/day)" "124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs spfarm/spcontent/spsql; steady, not bursty")
EV_4662=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "1356x EventID 4662 replication GUID 1131f6aa-9c07-11d1 SubjectUserName BASE-DC\$ (S-1-5-18) hourly" "AD replication (DS-Replication-Get-Changes) only by BASE-DC\$ machine account = benign self-replication, no foreign DCSync")
EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")

EV_TZ=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\TimeZoneInformation Bias=300" "Timezone bias 300 (UTC-5, US Eastern)")
EV_SHUT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\Windows ShutdownTime" "Last shutdown 2018-09-07 20:25:33 UTC")
EV_DOMAIN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=NetworkList Name: shieldbase.lan; LogonUI LastLoggedOnUser shieldbase\\rsydow-a" "Domain shieldbase.lan; last logged-on user rsydow-a")
EV_IP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Services\\Tcpip\\Parameters\\Interfaces IPAddress" "dc01 host IP 172.16.4.4 (secondary 10.10.4.4)")
EV_SAM=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users (Administrator/Guest/DefaultAccount)" "Local SAM accounts; domain accounts in NTDS")
echo "$EV_HOST $EV_OS $EV_INSTALL $EV_TZ $EV_SHUT $EV_DOMAIN $EV_IP $EV_SAM"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
MFT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"

# NTDS / credential theft chain
EV_NTDS_TEMP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132817; .\\temp\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + ntds.jfm + .\\temp\\registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:16:54" "ntdsutil IFM dump #1 to C:\\temp\\Active Directory (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDS_BKP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132835; .\\Windows\\System\\Backup\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:27:20-35" "ntdsutil IFM dump #2 to C:\\Windows\\System\\Backup (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDSUTIL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)" "spsql executed ntdsutil.exe repeatedly 2018-09-05 12:14-12:27 via WMI and WinRM")
EV_VSS=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543030; EventID 4688 vssadmin.exe parent wsmprovhost.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:05:18" "spsql ran vssadmin.exe via remote PowerShell 2018-09-05 12:05:18")
EV_WSMAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line ~2543877 area; 4688 ntdsutil parent=wsmprovhost.exe/WmiPrvSE.exe Subject spsql" "ntdsutil parent process = wsmprovhost.exe (WinRM) and WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI) = remote execution")
EV_SPSQL_LOGON=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2542776; EventID 4624 LogonType 3 TargetUserName spsql IpAddress 172.16.6.11 2018-09-05 12:xx" "spsql network logon (Type 3) to dc01 from 172.16.6.11 during NTDS dump window")
echo "NTDS: $EV_NTDS_TEMP $EV_NTDS_BKP $EV_NTDSUTIL $EV_VSS $EV_WSMAN $EV_SPSQL_LOGON"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
MFT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"
NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")
EV_MEMINFO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$INFO" "SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z; KeNumberProcessors=0 (RED/degraded)" "Memory dump degraded (virtual translation dead); physical-layer plugins only; SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z")
EV_FRESP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839610; EventID 7045 ServiceName 'F-Response Subject' 2018-09-06 22:11:15" "F-Response Subject service installed 2018-09-06 22:11:15 (IR acquisition tool)")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")
EV_MNEMO_MFT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132351; .\\Windows\\Mnemosyne.sys 26248 bytes Created 2018-09-07 20:30:59" "Mnemosyne.sys created in C:\\Windows 2018-09-07 20:30:59 (matches 7045 #3)")
echo "$EV_NETSCAN $EV_MEMINFO $EV_FRESP $EV_MNEMO $EV_MNEMO_MFT"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
SB="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shellbags/rsydow-a"

# logon / accounts / leads
EV_RDP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "24x EventID 4624 LogonType 10 TargetUserName rsydow-a RemoteHost 172.16.5.26 (one 172.16.4.7) 2018-07-10..2018-09-07" "All 24 RDP (Type 10) interactive logons to dc01 by rsydow-a from 172.16.5.26")
EV_4769RC4=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "124x EventID 4769 TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) ServiceName spfarm/spcontent/spsql 2018-08-02..09-07 (~2-5/day)" "124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs spfarm/spcontent/spsql; steady, not bursty")
EV_4662=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "1356x EventID 4662 replication GUID 1131f6aa-9c07-11d1 SubjectUserName BASE-DC\$ (S-1-5-18) hourly" "AD replication (DS-Replication-Get-Changes) only by BASE-DC\$ machine account = benign self-replication, no foreign DCSync")
EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")
EV_4720=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 4720 account creations 2018-07-13..08-13 by rsydow-a: srogers,amathews,jpallen,spsql,spfarm,spcontent,spservices,spinstall,jblake" "Domain account creations Jul-Aug 2018 by rsydow-a incl. SharePoint service accounts (spsql SID -1193)")
EV_TYLER=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2608117; EventID 4724/4738 Target shieldbase\\tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 01:37:23" "Password reset + SamAccountName change for tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 (in-window admin change)")
EV_SHARE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 5140 shares: IPC\$ 191292, SYSVOL 60961, C\$ 33, NETLOGON 11, ADMIN\$ 1" "5140 share access dominated by IPC\$/SYSVOL (DC baseline); only 33 C\$ and 1 ADMIN\$ admin-share accesses")
EV_SBROWSE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$SB" "BagMRU rsydow-a: base-wkstn-05\\c\$\\Windows\\Prefetch; base-file\\srl-admin\$\\AD" "rsydow-a Explorer browsed base-wkstn-05 C\$\\Windows\\Prefetch and admin shares (admin/IR activity)")
echo "$EV_RDP $EV_4769RC4 $EV_4662 $EV_BASEHUNT $EV_4720 $EV_TYLER $EV_SHARE $EV_SBROWSE"

findings.summary: dc01 was a lateral-movement target: service account spsql (SID -1193, network/Type-3 only) drove the NTDS theft via remote WinRM (wsmprovhost.exe) and WMI (WmiPrvSE.exe) from 172.16.6.11; memory netscan corroborates an established dc01<->172.16.6.11 session at capture time.

evidence.locator: line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)

# System identity

export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null

# NTDS / credential theft chain
EV_NTDS_TEMP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132817; .\\temp\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + ntds.jfm + .\\temp\\registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:16:54" "ntdsutil IFM dump #1 to C:\\temp\\Active Directory (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDS_BKP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132835; .\\Windows\\System\\Backup\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:27:20-35" "ntdsutil IFM dump #2 to C:\\Windows\\System\\Backup (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDSUTIL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)" "spsql executed ntdsutil.exe repeatedly 2018-09-05 12:14-12:27 via WMI and WinRM")

EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")

# System identity
EV_HOST=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\ComputerName\\ComputerName" "ComputerName=BASE-DC; SYSTEM hive")
EV_OS=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion ProductName/CurrentBuild" "Windows Server 2016 Standard, build 14393")
EV_INSTALL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion InstallDate" "OS InstallDate 2018-04-20 16:52:33 UTC")
EV_TZ=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\TimeZoneInformation Bias=300" "Timezone bias 300 (UTC-5, US Eastern)")
EV_SHUT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Control\\Windows ShutdownTime" "Last shutdown 2018-09-07 20:25:33 UTC")
EV_DOMAIN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=NetworkList Name: shieldbase.lan; LogonUI LastLoggedOnUser shieldbase\\rsydow-a" "Domain shieldbase.lan; last logged-on user rsydow-a")
EV_IP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=ControlSet001\\Services\\Tcpip\\Parameters\\Interfaces IPAddress" "dc01 host IP 172.16.4.4 (secondary 10.10.4.4)")
EV_SAM=$(add_evidence dc01 "$REG" "KeyPath=SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users (Administrator/Guest/DefaultAccount)" "Local SAM accounts; domain accounts in NTDS")

export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"

NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")
EV_MEMINFO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$INFO" "SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z; KeNumberProcessors=0 (RED/degraded)" "Memory dump degraded (virtual translation dead); physical-layer plugins only; SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z")
EV_FRESP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839610; EventID 7045 ServiceName 'F-Response Subject' 2018-09-06 22:11:15" "F-Response Subject service installed 2018-09-06 22:11:15 (IR acquisition tool)")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")
EV_MNEMO_MFT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132351; .\\Windows\\Mnemosyne.sys 26248 bytes Created 2018-09-07 20:30:59" "Mnemosyne.sys created in C:\\Windows 2018-09-07 20:30:59 (matches 7045 #3)")
echo "$EV_NETSCAN $EV_MEMINFO $EV_FRESP $EV_MNEMO $EV_MNEMO_MFT"

EV_WSMAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line ~2543877 area; 4688 ntdsutil parent=wsmprovhost.exe/WmiPrvSE.exe Subject spsql" "ntdsutil parent process = wsmprovhost.exe (WinRM) and WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI) = remote execution")
EV_SPSQL_LOGON=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2542776; EventID 4624 LogonType 3 TargetUserName spsql IpAddress 172.16.6.11 2018-09-05 12:xx" "spsql network logon (Type 3) to dc01 from 172.16.6.11 during NTDS dump window")
echo "NTDS: $EV_NTDS_TEMP $EV_NTDS_BKP $EV_NTDSUTIL $EV_VSS $EV_WSMAN $EV_SPSQL_LOGON"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
MFT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"
NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")

EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")

# NTDS / credential theft chain
EV_NTDS_TEMP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132817; .\\temp\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + ntds.jfm + .\\temp\\registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:16:54" "ntdsutil IFM dump #1 to C:\\temp\\Active Directory (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDS_BKP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132835; .\\Windows\\System\\Backup\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:27:20-35" "ntdsutil IFM dump #2 to C:\\Windows\\System\\Backup (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDSUTIL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)" "spsql executed ntdsutil.exe repeatedly 2018-09-05 12:14-12:27 via WMI and WinRM")

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")

MFT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/mft/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"
NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")
EV_MEMINFO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$INFO" "SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z; KeNumberProcessors=0 (RED/degraded)" "Memory dump degraded (virtual translation dead); physical-layer plugins only; SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z")
EV_FRESP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839610; EventID 7045 ServiceName 'F-Response Subject' 2018-09-06 22:11:15" "F-Response Subject service installed 2018-09-06 22:11:15 (IR acquisition tool)")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")
EV_MNEMO_MFT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132351; .\\Windows\\Mnemosyne.sys 26248 bytes Created 2018-09-07 20:30:59" "Mnemosyne.sys created in C:\\Windows 2018-09-07 20:30:59 (matches 7045 #3)")
echo "$EV_NETSCAN $EV_MEMINFO $EV_FRESP $EV_MNEMO $EV_MNEMO_MFT"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
SB="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shellbags/rsydow-a"

# logon / accounts / leads
EV_RDP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "24x EventID 4624 LogonType 10 TargetUserName rsydow-a RemoteHost 172.16.5.26 (one 172.16.4.7) 2018-07-10..2018-09-07" "All 24 RDP (Type 10) interactive logons to dc01 by rsydow-a from 172.16.5.26")
EV_4769RC4=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "124x EventID 4769 TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) ServiceName spfarm/spcontent/spsql 2018-08-02..09-07 (~2-5/day)" "124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs spfarm/spcontent/spsql; steady, not bursty")
EV_4662=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "1356x EventID 4662 replication GUID 1131f6aa-9c07-11d1 SubjectUserName BASE-DC\$ (S-1-5-18) hourly" "AD replication (DS-Replication-Get-Changes) only by BASE-DC\$ machine account = benign self-replication, no foreign DCSync")
EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")
EV_4720=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 4720 account creations 2018-07-13..08-13 by rsydow-a: srogers,amathews,jpallen,spsql,spfarm,spcontent,spservices,spinstall,jblake" "Domain account creations Jul-Aug 2018 by rsydow-a incl. SharePoint service accounts (spsql SID -1193)")
EV_TYLER=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2608117; EventID 4724/4738 Target shieldbase\\tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 01:37:23" "Password reset + SamAccountName change for tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 (in-window admin change)")
EV_SHARE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 5140 shares: IPC\$ 191292, SYSVOL 60961, C\$ 33, NETLOGON 11, ADMIN\$ 1" "5140 share access dominated by IPC\$/SYSVOL (DC baseline); only 33 C\$ and 1 ADMIN\$ admin-share accesses")
EV_SBROWSE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$SB" "BagMRU rsydow-a: base-wkstn-05\\c\$\\Windows\\Prefetch; base-file\\srl-admin\$\\AD" "rsydow-a Explorer browsed base-wkstn-05 C\$\\Windows\\Prefetch and admin shares (admin/IR activity)")
echo "$EV_RDP $EV_4769RC4 $EV_4662 $EV_BASEHUNT $EV_4720 $EV_TYLER $EV_SHARE $EV_SBROWSE"

findings.summary: 124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs (spfarm/spcontent/spsql) requested 2018-08..09 at a steady ~2-5/day; consistent with legacy SharePoint service Kerberos rather than a Kerberoasting burst. Lead only.

# NTDS / credential theft chain
EV_NTDS_TEMP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132817; .\\temp\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + ntds.jfm + .\\temp\\registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:16:54" "ntdsutil IFM dump #1 to C:\\temp\\Active Directory (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDS_BKP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132835; .\\Windows\\System\\Backup\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit + registry\\SYSTEM,SECURITY; Created 2018-09-05 12:27:20-35" "ntdsutil IFM dump #2 to C:\\Windows\\System\\Backup (ntds.dit 67MB + SYSTEM/SECURITY hives)")
EV_NTDSUTIL=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543877; EventID 4688 NewProcessName ntdsutil.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:14:50 (also 12:16:49 via WmiPrvSE, 12:18/12:26/12:27 via wsmprovhost)" "spsql executed ntdsutil.exe repeatedly 2018-09-05 12:14-12:27 via WMI and WinRM")
EV_VSS=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2543030; EventID 4688 vssadmin.exe parent wsmprovhost.exe Subject spsql 2018-09-05 12:05:18" "spsql ran vssadmin.exe via remote PowerShell 2018-09-05 12:05:18")
EV_WSMAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line ~2543877 area; 4688 ntdsutil parent=wsmprovhost.exe/WmiPrvSE.exe Subject spsql" "ntdsutil parent process = wsmprovhost.exe (WinRM) and WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI) = remote execution")
EV_SPSQL_LOGON=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2542776; EventID 4624 LogonType 3 TargetUserName spsql IpAddress 172.16.6.11 2018-09-05 12:xx" "spsql network logon (Type 3) to dc01 from 172.16.6.11 during NTDS dump window")
echo "NTDS: $EV_NTDS_TEMP $EV_NTDS_BKP $EV_NTDSUTIL $EV_VSS $EV_WSMAN $EV_SPSQL_LOGON"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh
EVTX="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/evtx/dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"

NS="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
INFO="export/dc01/memory-base-dc-memory.img/dc01-info-volatility3.txt"

# memory corroboration + responder tooling
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence dc01 "$NS" "row TCPv4 172.16.4.4:59992 -> 172.16.6.11:49665 ESTABLISHED" "Memory netscan: established session dc01(172.16.4.4) <-> 172.16.6.11 at capture time")
EV_MEMINFO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$INFO" "SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z; KeNumberProcessors=0 (RED/degraded)" "Memory dump degraded (virtual translation dead); physical-layer plugins only; SystemTime 2018-09-06 22:57:49Z")
EV_FRESP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839610; EventID 7045 ServiceName 'F-Response Subject' 2018-09-06 22:11:15" "F-Response Subject service installed 2018-09-06 22:11:15 (IR acquisition tool)")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2839611,2840092,2840149; EventID 7045 mnemosyne kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 22:11 & 2018-09-07 20:26/20:30" "mnemosyne.sys kernel driver installed alongside F-Response (acquisition driver)")
EV_MNEMO_MFT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 132351; .\\Windows\\Mnemosyne.sys 26248 bytes Created 2018-09-07 20:30:59" "Mnemosyne.sys created in C:\\Windows 2018-09-07 20:30:59 (matches 7045 #3)")
echo "$EV_NETSCAN $EV_MEMINFO $EV_FRESP $EV_MNEMO $EV_MNEMO_MFT"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
source ~/.claude/tools.env 2>/dev/null
source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

# logon / accounts / leads
EV_RDP=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "24x EventID 4624 LogonType 10 TargetUserName rsydow-a RemoteHost 172.16.5.26 (one 172.16.4.7) 2018-07-10..2018-09-07" "All 24 RDP (Type 10) interactive logons to dc01 by rsydow-a from 172.16.5.26")
EV_4769RC4=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "124x EventID 4769 TicketEncryptionType 0x17 (RC4) ServiceName spfarm/spcontent/spsql 2018-08-02..09-07 (~2-5/day)" "124 RC4 (0x17) Kerberos TGS tickets for SharePoint SPNs spfarm/spcontent/spsql; steady, not bursty")
EV_4662=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "1356x EventID 4662 replication GUID 1131f6aa-9c07-11d1 SubjectUserName BASE-DC\$ (S-1-5-18) hourly" "AD replication (DS-Replication-Get-Changes) only by BASE-DC\$ machine account = benign self-replication, no foreign DCSync")
EV_BASEHUNT=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2436076; 997x EventID 4625 TargetUserName BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 status 0xC0000072/0xC000006E 2018-08-31..09-07" "997 failed logons for machine account BASE-HUNT\$ from 172.16.5.25 (disabled/restricted account, daily) = likely IR hunt host")
EV_4720=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 4720 account creations 2018-07-13..08-13 by rsydow-a: srogers,amathews,jpallen,spsql,spfarm,spcontent,spservices,spinstall,jblake" "Domain account creations Jul-Aug 2018 by rsydow-a incl. SharePoint service accounts (spsql SID -1193)")
EV_TYLER=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "line 2608117; EventID 4724/4738 Target shieldbase\\tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 01:37:23" "Password reset + SamAccountName change for tyler.oslund by rsydow-a 2018-09-06 (in-window admin change)")
EV_SHARE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$EVTX" "EventID 5140 shares: IPC\$ 191292, SYSVOL 60961, C\$ 33, NETLOGON 11, ADMIN\$ 1" "5140 share access dominated by IPC\$/SYSVOL (DC baseline); only 33 C\$ and 1 ADMIN\$ admin-share accesses")
EV_SBROWSE=$(add_evidence dc01 "$SB" "BagMRU rsydow-a: base-wkstn-05\\c\$\\Windows\\Prefetch; base-file\\srl-admin\$\\AD" "rsydow-a Explorer browsed base-wkstn-05 C\$\\Windows\\Prefetch and admin shares (admin/IR activity)")
echo "$EV_RDP $EV_4769RC4 $EV_4662 $EV_BASEHUNT $EV_4720 $EV_TYLER $EV_SHARE $EV_SBROWSE"

findings.summary: Initial SYSTEM-level code execution on rd01 via PsExec-style services (random-hex names, ImagePath \\127.0.0.1\C$|ADMIN$\<hex>.exe, LocalSystem) installed by account spsql, each immediately preceded by a Type-3 NTLM logon from 172.16.6.14 (BASE-RD-04). cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

echo "=== state ==="; grep memory ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

pgrep -f 'vol.py' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "STILL RUNNING" || echo "all vol clear"

cat /tmp/vdeep.log | grep -iE 'statistics rc|rc='
echo "=== confirm svcscan/netscan present and non-empty ==="

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
pgrep -af 'vol.py' | grep -v pgrep; echo "grep_rc=$?"
echo "=== stats rc / timeout outcome ==="
grep -iE 'statistics rc|rc=' /tmp/vdeep.log
OUT="./export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
echo "stats bytes: $(wc -c < "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "svcscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-svcscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)  netscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
M=export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img
echo "=== netscan header ==="
head -1 "$M/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008

EVTX="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/evtx/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
RTSC="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/registry/20260616000427/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-spsql-ntuser-recmd_TerminalServerClient.csv"

NETSCAN="export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv"

EV_RDP_IN=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "line138909 (RecId 45596)" "4624 Type10 RDP logon spsql from 172.16.6.14 2018-08-28 21:39:08 (interactive RDP into rd01)")
EV_4648=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "4648 explicit-cred (grep TargetServerName, Aug-Sep)" "4648 explicit-cred logons: spsql to BASE-WKSTN-05/RD-05/RD-02/RD-06/base-sp/base-dc; nfury to BASE-WKSTN-05")
EV_RTSC=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RTSC" "TerminalServerClient MRU" "spsql NTUSER: outbound RDP hints 172.16.4.5 (as spsql), 172.16.6.14 & 172.16.7.15 (as shieldbase\\nfury) 2018-08-31..09-05")

SHIM="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/shimcache/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-shimcache-appcompatcacheparser.csv"
MFT="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/mft/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-mft-mftecmd.csv"

# F-Response IR tooling (benign)
EV_FRESP_SVC=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "line159167 (RecId 8126)" "7045 'F-Response Subject' C:\\windows\\subject_srv.exe -s base-hunt.shieldbase.lan:5682 LocalSystem 2018-09-06 18:28:30 (installed by cbarton-a SID 1185)")
EV_FRESP_MEM=$(add_evidence rd01 "$SVCSCAN" "F-Response Subject PID 1096" "svcscan/netscan: subject_srv.exe(1096) AUTO_START RUNNING, listens TCP 3262, conn to base-hunt -> F-Response IR agent")
EV_MNEMO=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "line150402 (RecId 57089)" "4697 'mnemosyne' kernel driver C:\\windows/Mnemosyne.sys 2018-09-06 18:28:31 (F-Response memory driver, by BASE-RD-01\$)")
# Timestomp on subject_srv (F-Response behavior, note as benign context)
EV_TS=$(add_evidence rd01 "$MFT" "EntryNumber 12982" "MFT C:\\Windows\\subject_srv.exe SI Created 2018-09-06 18:28:30 vs FN Created 2018-04-10 19:29:48 (SI<FN timestomp; F-Response tooling)")
# Brute-force / failed logons (pre-window)
EV_4625=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "4625 by IpAddress (Security-Auditing)" "4625 failed logons: 23x tdungan from 192.168.30.10 (Jul 2018, pre-window), 12x spsql/Guest from 172.16.6.14")
EV_1102=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "line(RecId 494)" "1102 Security log cleared once 2018-05-04 by WIN10-TEST\\Administrator (imaging/provisioning baseline)")
echo "$EV_FRESP_SVC $EV_FRESP_MEM $EV_MNEMO $EV_TS $EV_4625 $EV_1102"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh
IMG="./sources/rd01/base-rd01-memory.img"
OUT="$CASE_ROOT/export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
ERR="$OUT/err"

# statistics with hard 300s timeout (it stalled previously); svcscan + netscan as deep corroboration
run_artifact rd01 _asset memory-base-rd01-memory.img \
  bash -c '
    VOL="'"$VOLATILITY3"'"; IMG="'"$IMG"'"; OUT="'"$OUT"'"; ERR="'"$ERR"'"
    timeout 300 $VOL -f "$IMG" windows.statistics 2> "$ERR/rd01-statistics.err" | tee "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt"
    echo "statistics rc=$? (124=timeout)"
    $VOL -f "$IMG" -r csv windows.svcscan 2> "$ERR/rd01-svcscan.err" | tee "$OUT/rd01-svcscan-volatility3.csv"
    $VOL -f "$IMG" -r csv windows.netscan 2> "$ERR/rd01-netscan.err" | tee "$OUT/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
  ' >/dev/null 2>/tmp/vdeep.log
echo "deep set run_artifact: $?"
echo "=== statistics rc ==="; grep 'statistics rc' /tmp/vdeep.log
OUT="./export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
echo "=== statistics content ==="; cat "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt" 2>/dev/null | head
for p in svcscan netscan; do
  f="$OUT/rd01-$p-volatility3.csv"
  echo "$p rows=$([ -f "$f" ] && wc -l < "$f" || echo NA)"
done
echo "=== state ==="; grep memory ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
# Light poll: check every 20s up to ~5.5 min for the deep set bash to exit
for i in $(seq 1 16); do
  pgrep -f 'vol.py' >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "vol done iter=$i"; break; }
  sleep 20
done
echo "=== final check ==="
pgrep -f 'vol.py' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "STILL RUNNING" || echo "CLEAR"
OUT="./export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
echo "stats rc line:"; grep 'statistics rc' /tmp/vdeep.log 2>/dev/null
echo "stats bytes: $(wc -c < "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "stats head:"; head -12 "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt" 2>/dev/null
echo "svcscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-svcscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "netscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "=== state ==="; grep memory ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
pkill -f 'vol.py' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2
pgrep -f 'vol.py' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "STILL RUNNING" || echo "all vol clear"
echo "=== stats rc from log ==="
cat /tmp/vdeep.log | grep -iE 'statistics rc|rc='
echo "=== confirm svcscan/netscan present and non-empty ==="
OUT="./export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
ls -la "$OUT"/rd01-svcscan-volatility3.csv "$OUT"/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv 2>/dev/null
echo "=== netscan err check ==="
grep -vE 'Progress|Updating caches' "$OUT/err/rd01-netscan.err" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'error|exception' | head -2 || echo "netscan clean"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
pgrep -af 'vol.py' | grep -v pgrep; echo "grep_rc=$?"
echo "=== stats rc / timeout outcome ==="
grep -iE 'statistics rc|rc=' /tmp/vdeep.log
OUT="./export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img"
echo "stats bytes: $(wc -c < "$OUT/rd01-statistics-volatility3.txt" 2>/dev/null)"
echo "svcscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-svcscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)  netscan rows: $(wc -l < "$OUT/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv" 2>/dev/null)"

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
M=export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img
echo "=== netscan header ==="
head -1 "$M/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv"
echo "=== established / foreign connections (non-local) ==="
grep -iE 'ESTABLISHED|CLOSE|SYN' "$M/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv" | grep -vE ',127\.0\.0\.1,|,0\.0\.0\.0,|,::,|,::1,' | head -40

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"; export CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"; source ./tmp/analyze_helpers.sh

EVTX="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/evtx/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-evtx-evtxecmd.csv"
RTSC="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/registry/20260616000427/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-spsql-ntuser-recmd_TerminalServerClient.csv"
RDOCS="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/registry/20260616000427/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-spsql-ntuser-recmd_RecentDocs.csv"
RWWQ="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/registry/20260616000427/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-spsql-ntuser-recmd_WordWheelQuery.csv"
RUA="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/registry/20260616000427/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-spsql-ntuser-recmd_UserAssist.csv"
RBIN="export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/recyclebin/rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-recyclebin-rbcmd.csv"
NETSCAN="export/rd01/memory-base-rd01-memory.img/rd01-netscan-volatility3.csv"

EV_RDP_IN=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "line138909 (RecId 45596)" "4624 Type10 RDP logon spsql from 172.16.6.14 2018-08-28 21:39:08 (interactive RDP into rd01)")
EV_4648=$(add_evidence rd01 "$EVTX" "4648 explicit-cred (grep TargetServerName, Aug-Sep)" "4648 explicit-cred logons: spsql to BASE-WKSTN-05/RD-05/RD-02/RD-06/base-sp/base-dc; nfury to BASE-WKSTN-05")
EV_RTSC=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RTSC" "TerminalServerClient MRU" "spsql NTUSER: outbound RDP hints 172.16.4.5 (as spsql), 172.16.6.14 & 172.16.7.15 (as shieldbase\\nfury) 2018-08-31..09-05")
EV_WWQ=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RWWQ" "WordWheelQuery" "spsql Explorer searches: carbonadium, mayhem, adamantium, project 2018-08-28")
EV_RDOCS=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RDOCS" "RecentDocs" "spsql RecentDocs: CONFIDENTIAL - Project Mayhem.pptx, carbonadium-info.doc, Carbon-Steel-Handbook.pdf, OneDrive-Stark Research Labs, Logs/WindowsServerBackup 2018-08-28..09-05")
EV_RBIN=$(add_evidence rd01 "$RBIN" "spsql SID 1193 \$IW2YF61" "RecycleBin: spsql deleted C:\\Windows\\Logs\\SysBackup (182117373 bytes) 2018-09-05 13:15:53")
EV_NETSCAN=$(add_evidence rd01 "$NETSCAN" "172.16.4.10:8080 / 172.16.4.5:3389/445" "netscan: rd01(172.16.6.11) many conns to 172.16.4.10:8080, outbound RDP 172.16.4.5:3389, SMB 172.16.7.15:445/172.16.4.5:445, LDAP 172.16.4.4:389, WinRM 172.16.5.21:5985")
echo "$EV_RDP_IN $EV_4648 $EV_RTSC $EV_WWQ $EV_RDOCS $EV_RBIN $EV_NETSCAN"

findings.summary: Failed-logon clusters: 23x tdungan from 192.168.30.10 (Jul 2018) and 12x spsql/Guest from 172.16.6.14 (Aug 2018). The tdungan bursts predate the incident window (lead only); the 172.16.6.14 attempts align with the confirmed pivot host.

echo "=== state ==="; grep memory ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
